items.title: He Profits Off Raw Milk That’s Making People Sick. The Government Isn’t Stopping Him.
items.dek: >“I’ve put a couple kids in the hospital, and they have been sick, but they recovered,” McAfee acknowledged before my visit. >“We have a red-flag system here, w
items.body: >“I’ve put a couple kids in the hospital, and they have been sick, but they recovered,” McAfee acknowledged before my visit. >“We have a red-flag system here, where if there’s anything that gets really out of whack, they can immediately tag the milk, and it doesn’t go to anything but cheese,” McAfee told me. “Because, you know, cheese is resistant to pathogens.” Research has shown that raw cheese is not, in fact, resistant to pathogens; submitted by /u/Mephisto1822 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Accused of parents’ killings, Rob Reiner’s son seeks money from the trust they left for him

items.title: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.
items.body: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.
